MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-29-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Gena Eales
Appearances:
Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. for Plaintiff, Quang Truong also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Quang Truong and against the defendant: Michael Murphy.
Possession of the premises located at: 3063 Sacramento #19, San Francisco, CA
Forfeiture of the rental agreement
Principal/Damages of $1,608.86
Costs of $170.30
For the total of $1779.16
Judgment signed in open cour.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Plaintiff, Quang Truong in pro per
Defendant, Michael S. Murphy in pro per
